zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith de Flandre於1033年出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔時，她的父親Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre53歲，母親Éléonore de Normandie23歲。她於1051年與Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1094年3月5日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 特勞恩斯坦特勞恩斯坦享年61歲，埋葬在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 拉文斯包格維音加特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith de Flandre于1033年出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫布盧潔时，她的父亲Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre53岁，母亲Éléonore de Normandie23岁。她于1051年与Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1094年3月5日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 特勞恩斯坦特勞恩斯坦享年61岁，埋葬在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 拉文斯包格維音加特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith de Flandre was born in 1033, in Brugge, West Flanders, Belgium, her father, Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre, was 53 and her mother, Éléonore de Normandie, was 23. She married Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria in 1051. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 March 1094, in Traunstein, Traunstein, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 61, and was buried in Weingarten, Ravensburg, Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith de Flandre est née en 1033, à Brugge, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Éléonore de Normandie, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria en 1051. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 mars 1094, à Traunstein, Landkreis Traunstein, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith de Flandre 1033 in Brugge, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre 53 und ihre Mutter Éléonore de Normandie 23. Sie hat 1051 Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 5. März 1094 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Traunstein, Landkreis Traunstein, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Flandre è nata il nel 1033 nel Brugge, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, sua padre, Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Éléonore de Normandie, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria nel 1051. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 marzo 1094, nel Traunstein, Landkreis Traunstein, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith de Flandreが1033年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンブルグッジで生まれた時，父Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandreは53歳，母Éléonore de Normandieは23歳であった。1051年にTostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1094年3月5日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス トラウンステイントラウンステインで61歳で死去し，ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ラベンスブルグウエインガーテンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith de Flandre(이)가 1033년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브루지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Éléonore de Normandie(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1051년 Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1094년 3월 5일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 트라스타인 트라스타인에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 레이븐스버그 위그가르텐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Flandre nasceu em 1033, em Brugge, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Éléonore de Normandie, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria em 1051. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 5 de março de 1094, em Traunstein, Landkreis Traunstein, Bayern, Alemanha, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith de Flandre родилась в 1033 г. в местности бруг, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Éléonore de Normandie, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria в 1051 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 марта 1094 г. в местности траунстин, ландкрис траунстин, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности вингартен, обирамт равенсбург, вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith de Flandre nació en 1033, en Brugge, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin IV 'le Barbu' Comte de Flandre, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Éléonore de Normandie, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Tostig Godwinson Earl of Northumbria en 1051. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1094, en Traunstein, Landkreis Traunstein, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Weingarten, Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Alemania.
